# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
- Python code favors small functions, light typing, and clear docstrings; see [src/llm.py](../src/llm.py) and [src/storage.py](../src/storage.py).
- Error handling often uses broad try/except with user-facing prints; see [main.py](../main.py) for CLI flow.

## Architecture
- CLI entry in [main.py](../main.py) wires git diffs, LLM agents, storage, and vector indexing.
- Commit flow is a LangGraph state machine in [src/graph.py](../src/graph.py).
- Agent stages are DSPy `Signature` + `ChainOfThought` modules in [src/agents.py](../src/agents.py).

## Build and Test
- Install deps: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
- Generate master context: `python3 main.py --onboard`
- Generate catchup: `python3 main.py --catchup`
- Generate checkpoint for a commit: `python3 main.py --commit <hash>`

## Project Conventions
- Checkpoints are written under `checkpoints/` with timestamped filenames; see [src/storage.py](../src/storage.py).
- Mermaid diagrams are generated by AST parsing and returned as fenced strings; see [src/mermaid_utils.py](../src/mermaid_utils.py) and tests in [tests/test_mermaid_utils.py](../tests/test_mermaid_utils.py).
- Git author detection relies on local `user.email`; see [src/git_utils.py](../src/git_utils.py) and [main.py](../main.py).

## Integration Points
- LLM uses Mistral AI via `MISTRAL_API_KEY` and a custom `MistralLM`; see [src/llm.py](../src/llm.py).
- Vector indexing uses a local ChromaDB persistent client at `.chroma_db`; see [src/vector_db.py](../src/vector_db.py).
- Git history/diffs are retrieved via GitPython helpers; see [src/git_utils.py](../src/git_utils.py).

## Security
- LLM calls send diffs/checkpoint content to Mistral AI; avoid leaking secrets in repo data.
- API key is loaded from `.env`; do not commit secrets; see [README.md](../README.md).
- Checkpoints and ChromaDB data persist locally; consider data retention if handling sensitive content.|

## ANCHORING BIAS REMINDER
Give your genuine take first without mirroring user tone/sentiment. If you disagree, just disagree and explain why.
